transcript.content: Have the child executor finish the Ledger import preview ticket.

Child executor reports completion. Evidence and review pass for the Ledger import preview scope. During the work it discovered three retrospective items: stable ledger import tests require tracked CSV files plus a frozen posting date after two failed inline fixture attempts; the settled domain name is sourceRef rather than externalId; archive import still lacks malformed-currency coverage and is outside this ticket. Active knowledge names the durable skill identity as ledger-import-fixture-replay. The workspace does not currently contain a harness-native skills directory.
